summary: Review Validator-B pipeline design against authority documents and identify improvement points.

spec.title: Review Validator-B pipeline design
spec.objective: Analyze authority documents and current Validator-B pipeline behavior to judge whether the design is complete and identify concrete improvements, without code changes unless requested later.
scope: Review AGENTS.md, ARCHITECTURE.md, SECURITY.md, validator role doc, git branch policy, task lifecycle, work history policy, output formats, tool permissions, and relevant Validator-B guide/script artifacts.
Compare documented Validator-B rules against scripts/run-validator-b.mjs and recent TASK-20260430-001..003 evidence.
Report findings ordered by severity with file references and actionable recommendations.
success_criteria: Findings are grounded in local documents or code artifacts.
Security, independence, handoff, resource failure, merge gate, logging, and Windows/Gemini runtime assumptions are covered.
If no code change is made, explain that this is a review-only task.
constraints: Do not include secrets, tokens, or PII.
Do not browse external content; this is a local authority-doc review.
Do not modify Validator-B pipeline code in this task unless the user explicitly asks for fixes.

next_action: Read authority documents and Validator-B implementation artifacts.

summary: Completed review-only Validator-B pipeline design analysis.

top_findings: Tier 3 completion gate only checks for any VALIDATION_RESULT, not both Validator-A and Validator-B PASS plus Analyst approval.
run-validator-b does not append RESOURCE_FAILURE when Gemini exits 0 but returns unparsable or schema-invalid output.
Authority docs still say Validator-B uses Gemini Sandbox while the operational guide and wrapper use --approval-mode plan without --sandbox.
details.quality_score_skipped_reason: Tier1 review-only analysis with no code or guide change requested.
details.branch_omission_reason: Review-only Tier1 analysis; no production or harness code changes were made.
